queries.question: List all of the textbooks and only those online courses that are suitable for those who understand the basics.
queries.sql:
SELECT Learning_Materials.title 
FROM Learning_Materials JOIN Difficulty_levels ON Learning_Materials.difficultyLevel = Difficulty_levels.difficultyLevel
WHERE Learning_Materials.typeOfMaterial = "Textbook" OR Learning_Materials.typeOfMaterial = "Online Course" AND Difficulty_levels.levelDescription = "For those who have a good understanding of the basics."
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?learning_materials a :Learning_Materials .
  ?difficulty_levels a :Difficulty_Level .
  ?learning_materials p:hasDifficulty_levels ?difficulty_levels .
  ?learning_materials p:title ?title .
  ?learning_materials p:typeOfMaterial ?typeofmaterial_w .
  ?learning_materials p:typeOfMaterial ?typeofmaterial_w2 .
  ?difficulty_levels p:levelDescription ?leveldescription_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typeofmaterial_w) = "Textbook" || (STR(?typeofmaterial_w2) = "Online Course" && STR(?leveldescription_w) = "For those who have a good understanding of the basics.")))
}

queries.question: List both the textbooks for students who understand the basics and online courses for audiences at the same level.
queries.sql:
SELECT Learning_Materials.title 
FROM Learning_Materials JOIN Difficulty_levels ON Learning_Materials.difficultyLevel = Difficulty_levels.difficultyLevel
WHERE (Learning_Materials.typeOfMaterial = "Textbook" OR Learning_Materials.typeOfMaterial = "Online Course") AND Difficulty_levels.levelDescription = "For those who have a good understanding of the basics."
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?learning_materials a :Learning_Materials .
  ?difficulty_levels a :Difficulty_Level .
  ?learning_materials p:hasDifficulty_levels ?difficulty_levels .
  ?learning_materials p:title ?title .
  ?learning_materials p:typeOfMaterial ?typeofmaterial_w .
  ?learning_materials p:typeOfMaterial ?typeofmaterial_w2 .
  ?difficulty_levels p:levelDescription ?leveldescription_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typeofmaterial_w) = "Textbook" || STR(?typeofmaterial_w2) = "Online Course")) && STR(?leveldescription_w) = "For those who have a good understanding of the basics."))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all textbooks and online courses for students who understand the basics.
